title: RocketJoin
description: Create custom join messages with groups, commands on join, sounds and more. PlaceholderAPI support
body:
![RocketJoin - Advanced CustomJoinMessages plugin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7328361e5b28b349b169f98781b904a86dc6b111.png)

RocketJoin is an OpenSource plugin that allows you to create custom join messages with groups, commands on join, sounds and more.

![Installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7440b16ccac4a33d8e1a58fabae8aa7dbb13d2c9.png)

Installing RocketJoin is very easy.​

1. Install RocketJoin
2. **Optional:** Install PlaceholderAPI
3. Done!

![Some features of the plugin: Run commands on player join, customize all aspects of the plugin, create custom conditions and use our documentation to learn more.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89312a6603ae1391fd7445d1050fa11928083d52.png)

![Features Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7101fb08cafd54087ec67e3d68d1d52143cff7ad.png)

- Fully Customizable
- Fast support
- PlaceholderAPI support
- Custom conditions like first join and permissions
- Fireworks sounds and more
- Bungeecord support
- Hex support
